name: message_create
description: Send a structured list of input messages with text and/or image content, and the model will generate the next message in the conversation. Supports multi-turn conversations, vision, tool use, extended thinking, documents, and system prompts.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with alternating user/assistant roles. Each message has 'role' and 'content' (string or array of content blocks).

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate before stopping.

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: System prompt for context and instructions.

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.description: Sample from the top K most likely tokens.

parameters.name: stop_sequences
parameters.description: Custom sequences that will cause the model to stop generating.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Tool definitions the model may use, each with name, description, and input_schema.

parameters.name: tool_choice
parameters.description: How the model should use tools: auto, any, specific tool, or none.

parameters.name: thinking
parameters.description: Extended thinking configuration for chain-of-thought reasoning.

messages.content: Explain quantum entanglement in simple terms.

content.text: Quantum entanglement is a phenomenon where two particles become connected in such a way that the state of one instantly influences the state of the other, regardless of the distance between them.
